subject: A massive golden Great Ape (Oozaru transformation) with mouth open in a roar, dominating the frame
suspected_ip: Son Goku (Dragon Ball Super) — Great Ape / Oozaru form
description: An enormous ape-like creature fills the frame, covered in golden fur with a wide-open roaring mouth showing large teeth. The creature's massive head and upper body dominate the composition. The background is a chaotic burst of energy and dark contrast, emphasizing the scale and ferocity of the transformed form. The overall palette is golden yellow against dark dramatic contrast. The figure's expression is pure feral aggression.
foreground: Massive golden-furred Great Ape, wide-open mouth, bared teeth, roaring
background: Dark energy burst, chaotic contrasting lights and darks
emotion: feral rage, open-mouthed roar, total aggression
